title: Module 1 — What an LLM Actually Is
goal: Build a rock-solid, jargon-free mental model of how a large language model works.

title: Module 2 — Building Reliable AI Features
goal: The five-technique builder’s toolkit for dependable AI features.

title: Module 3 — Agents & Agentic Software Engineering
goal: The defining shift of 2026: AI that acts, not just answers.

title: Module 4 — Proving It Works: Evals & Observability
goal: The discipline that separates shipped products from demos.

title: Module 5 — Safety, Security & Governance
goal: Ship AI that won’t make headlines for the wrong reasons.

title: Module 6 — Production AI & LLMOps
goal: Turn a prototype into a reliable, affordable, durable product.

title: Module 7 — The Product Owner’s Edge
goal: Step back and think like a Silicon Valley owner. (Flywheel is taught canonically in the Product track.)

title: Module 1 — How Great Product Companies Work
goal: The operating system of the best tech companies.

title: Module 2 — Product Discovery
goal: De-risk ideas cheaply before expensive engineering time.

title: Module 3 — Vision, Strategy & Saying No
goal: Set direction and make the ruthless trade-offs.

title: Module 4 — Leading People
goal: The human side — where most transformations fail.

title: Module 5 — Managing AI Products
goal: A different animal: probabilistic, not deterministic.

title: Module 6 — Business & Engineering Edge of AI
goal: The commercial realities that decide survival.
